entity.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and continuing to operate spot and derivatives markets under the XT.COM brand.
entity.notes: Current official XT.COM materials consistently identify 2018 as the founding year and Seychelles as the registration jurisdiction. The reviewed sources do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 remains a year-level marker.

expected.summary: Seychelles-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the XT.COM brand.

changes.summary: Seychelles-registered centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in 2018 and continuing to operate spot and derivatives markets under the XT.COM brand.
changes.notes: Current official XT.COM materials consistently identify 2018 as the founding year and Seychelles as the registration jurisdiction. The reviewed sources do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 remains a year-level marker.

events.title: XT.COM was founded in 2018
events.description: XT.COM was founded in 2018 as a Seychelles-registered centralized digital-asset trading platform.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact public launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

evidence.title: About XT.COM
evidence.notes: The official company page identifies XT.COM as operating since 2018.

evidence.title: XT.COM exchange overview
evidence.notes: Official XT.COM material states that the exchange was founded in 2018 and is headquartered or registered in Seychelles.

evidence.title: XT.COM official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current XT.COM identity and active trading platform.
